description: CompositionNavy blue sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hem, brand badge in graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsEvery man's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this blue sweatshirt from wrangler.
